_comment: Ralph Configuration - Copy this to config.json and edit
_developer_mode_help: When true, screens won't be cleared between menus so you can scroll through history
_verbose_mode_help: When true, shows detailed output and debug information
_venv_mode_help: Virtual environment mode: 'auto' (detect if needed), 'always' (always create), 'disabled' (never create, not recommended)
_allow_all_paths_help: When true, passes --allow-all-paths to Copilot CLI, disabling file path verification (allows access to any path on the filesystem). Default: true for autonomous operation.
_additional_dirs_help: Array of directory paths to grant Copilot CLI access to via --add-dir (e.g. ['D:/Git/other-project', 'C:/shared/docs']). Use forward slashes or escaped backslashes.
